statement: In every magma, Equation 1280 (`x = y * (((x * x) * y) * z)`) implies Equation 1034 (`x = x * ((x * (y * z)) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0756
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x x) y) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op x (op y z)) w))
